---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Alpha Search
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Description

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. For example: "I find it difficult to ..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like.
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include:

- How the feature should work
- What the user interface or API should look like
- Any configuration options

```python
# Example of proposed API (optional)
from alpha_search.sentiment import SentimentAnalyzer

analyzer = SentimentAnalyzer(source="news")
score = analyzer.analyze("RELIANCE.NS")
```

## Alternative Approaches

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.
Why might they be better or worse than your proposed solution?

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the feature request here:

- Links to relevant research, papers, or implementations
- Mockups or sketches (if UI-related)
- Use cases and user stories
- Performance considerations

## Willing to Contribute

- [ ] I am willing to submit a pull request to implement this feature
- [ ] I would need guidance to implement this feature
- [ ] I am not able to implement this feature

If you're willing to contribute, let us know if you'd like any pointers to get started.
